queries.original_sql_xml:
<select id="selectOrgHierarchy" parameterType="String" resultType="OrgVO">
    SELECT ORG_ID,
           ORG_NAME,
           PARENT_ORG_ID,
           LEVEL AS DEPTH,
           SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(ORG_NAME, ' > ') AS FULL_PATH,
           CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF AS IS_LEAF
    FROM TB_ORG
    START WITH PARENT_ORG_ID IS NULL
    CONNECT BY PRIOR ORG_ID = PARENT_ORG_ID
    ORDER SIBLINGS BY SORT_ORDER
</select>

<update id="mergeUserStats" parameterType="StatsVO">
    MERGE INTO TB_USER_STATS T
    USING (
        SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID,
               #{statDate} AS STAT_DATE
        FROM DUAL
    ) S
    ON (T.USER_ID = S.USER_ID AND T.STAT_DATE = S.STAT_DATE)
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
        UPDATE SET
            LOGIN_CNT = T.LOGIN_CNT + #{loginCnt},
            PAGE_VIEW = T.PAGE_VIEW + #{pageView},
            MOD_DATE = SYSDATE
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (USER_ID, STAT_DATE, LOGIN_CNT, PAGE_VIEW, REG_DATE)
        VALUES (S.USER_ID, S.STAT_DATE, #{loginCnt}, #{pageView}, SYSDATE)
</update>

<select id="selectPivotReport" resultType="map">
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT DEPT_ID,
               TO_CHAR(ORDER_DATE, 'MM') AS MONTH,
               TOTAL_AMT
        FROM TB_ORDER O
        JOIN TB_CUSTOMER C ON O.CUST_ID = C.CUST_ID
        WHERE O.ORDER_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('20260101', 'YYYYMMDD')
                               AND TO_DATE('20261231', 'YYYYMMDD')
    )
    PIVOT (
        SUM(TOTAL_AMT)
        FOR MONTH IN ('01' AS M01, '02' AS M02, '03' AS M03,
                      '04' AS M04, '05' AS M05, '06' AS M06,
                      '07' AS M07, '08' AS M08, '09' AS M09,
                      '10' AS M10, '11' AS M11, '12' AS M12)
    )
    ORDER BY DEPT_ID
</select>

<select id="selectWithHintAndWmConcat" parameterType="map" resultType="map">
    SELECT /*+ INDEX(O IDX_ORDER_DATE) LEADING(O C) USE_NL(C) */
           O.ORDER_ID,
           O.CUST_ID,
           WM_CONCAT(P.PROD_NAME) AS PROD_LIST,
           LISTAGG(P.PROD_CODE, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY P.PROD_CODE) AS PROD_CODES,
           DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(O.MEMO, 100, 1) AS MEMO_SHORT
    FROM TB_ORDER O, TB_CUSTOMER C, TB_ORDER_PROD OP, TB_PRODUCT P
    WHERE O.CUST_ID = C.CUST_ID(+)
      AND O.ORDER_ID = OP.ORDER_ID
      AND OP.PROD_ID = P.PROD_ID
      AND O.ORDER_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -#{months})
    GROUP BY O.ORDER_ID, O.CUST_ID, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(O.MEMO, 100, 1)
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount}
</select>

<select id="selectComplexSubquery" parameterType="map" resultType="map">
    SELECT A.USER_ID,
           A.USER_NAME,
           NVL(B.ORDER_CNT, 0) AS ORDER_CNT,
           NVL(B.TOTAL_AMT, 0) AS TOTAL_AMT,
           DECODE(SIGN(NVL(B.TOTAL_AMT, 0) - 1000000), 1, 'VIP', 0, 'VIP', 'NORMAL') AS GRADE,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY NVL(B.TOTAL_AMT, 0) DESC) AS RANK_NO
    FROM TB_USER A,
         (
            SELECT CUST_ID,
                   COUNT(*) AS ORDER_CNT,
                   SUM(TOTAL_AMT) AS TOTAL_AMT
            FROM TB_ORDER
            WHERE ORDER_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
                                 AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
              AND STATUS != '99'
            GROUP BY CUST_ID
         ) B
    WHERE A.USER_ID = B.CUST_ID(+)
    <if test="grade != null and grade == 'VIP'">
      AND NVL(B.TOTAL_AMT, 0) >= 1000000
    </if>
    ORDER BY RANK_NO
    <if test="limit != null">
      FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
    </if>
</select>
